scripts.build: node scripts/bundle_icons.js && tailwindcss build -i static/assets/css/app.css -o static/assets/css/app.dist.css --minify
scripts.build:all:compress: node scripts/bundle_icons.js && tailwindcss build -i static/assets/css/app.css -o static/assets/css/app.dist.css --minify && brotli -f static/assets/css/*.dist.css && brotli -f static/assets/js/*.dist.js
